description: Synthetic Pinterest evidence for a visual relevance and decision-gate test.

config.decisionToMake: Which original print-on-demand product concepts should I test next?
config.offer: Print-on-demand apparel, mugs, tote bags, and wall art for book lovers.
config.targetAudience: Adult readers in the United States who buy witty, tasteful gifts and home accessories.
config.brandStyle: Modern editorial typography, restrained color, clever but not snarky.
config.constraints: Original concepts only. Avoid copyrighted characters, book covers, author quotes, and trademarks.
